title: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water with Aloe Vera, Vitamin E & Chamomile Flower Extract | 3-in-1 - Gently Removes Makeup, Cleanses, Soothes & Hydrates Skin | Suitable for Face, Eyes and Lips (200ml)

features: REMOVES MAKE UP WITH EASE: The micellar water molecules lift away make up, dirt and oil from the skin in seconds. Whether removing long-wear mascara or foundation, this cleanser does the hard work with zero need for scrubbing.

SOOTHING SKINCARE ESSENTIAL: With added chamomile and aloe vera, this gentle formula helps calm redness and irritation while leaving skin soft and hydrated. Ideal for dry, sensitive or stressed-out complexions after a long day.

NO-RINSE SIMPLE FACE WASH: Designed for convenience, this simple face wash requires no water, making it perfect for travel, gym bags or quick morning cleanses. Just sweep across skin with a cotton pad and go.

SUITABLE FOR FACE, EYES & LIPS: Safe to use all over, including delicate eye and lip areas, making it a complete cleansing solution in one bottle. A great choice for those who wear a full face of make up or just need a quick skin refresh.
ENRICHED WITH VITAMIN E: Helps support healthy skin and protects against moisture loss, giving the complexion a soft, nourished feel after every use. Ideal for daily skincare routines all year round.

AVAILABLE IN THREE SIZES: Choose from 200ml for travel, 400ml for everyday use or a 700ml bottle for longer-lasting value. Whether on a beauty shelf or in a suitcase, there’s a perfect size for every need.
description: Product Description Effortlessly sweep away the day with Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water – a gentle yet powerful 3-in-1 skincare essential designed to cleanse, soothe and hydrate all in one simple step. Infused with nourishing aloe vera, calming chamomile and vitamin E, this micellar water lifts away dirt, oil and even stubborn make up without rubbing or rinsing. Ideal for everyday cleansing or quick refreshes on the go, this formula leaves skin feeling clean, soft and comfortably hydrated – never tight or dry. Perfect as a simple face wash alternative or as part of a daily beauty routine, this micellar water is suitable for use on the face, eyes and lips. Whether at home or packed in a suitcase as one of those must-have holiday essentials for women, it provides fuss-free cleansing wherever it’s needed. Available in a handy 200ml, a family-size 400ml or a long-lasting 700ml bottle, it’s the everyday cleanser that fits every lifestyle. Ingredients Aqua, Phenoxyethanol, Glycerine, Polysorbate-20, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Panthenol, Propylene Glycol, Tetrasodium EDTA, Caprylyl Glycol, Citric Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Tocopherol (Vitamin E) Acetate, Parfum, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Extract, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellol. Directions Apply the cleansing water to a cotton pad and sweep across your face, paying special attention to the eye and lip area if you are removing make-up. No need to rinse. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Ltd, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. 151 Products Ireland, Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
